nasb.text: So she went from him and shut the door behind her and her sons; they were bringing the vessels to her and she poured.

esv.text: So she went from him and shut the door behind herself and her sons. And as she poured they brought the vessels to her.

cnv.text: 於是婦人離開了他，把自己和兒子關在門內；她的兒子不住地把器皿拿到她面前，她就把油倒進去。

ccb.text: 于是，妇人辞别以利沙，回去后把自己和儿子关在屋里，儿子递给她器皿，她就倒油。
